drop_files_support: Support for TXT, EPUB, SRT, and DOCX
drop_files_refine_support: Polish an existing translation — same language in, same language out
per_file_refine_after_title: Run a refinement pass on this file's output after translation
zone_locked: Drop area locked while the queue is in {{operation}} mode.
zone_locked_current: Queue is in {{current}} mode — clear it before switching.
batch_completed: ✅ Batch translation completed for all files!
batch_completed_log: 🏁 All files in the batch have been processed.
batch_paused_log: ⏸️ Batch processing paused (rate limited). Resume from the section below.
interrupt_before_clear_log: 🛑 Interrupting current translation before clearing files...
validation_custom_source: Please specify the custom source language for the batch.
validation_custom_target: Please specify the custom target language for the batch.
validation_model: Please select an LLM model for the batch.
validation_ollama_endpoint: Ollama API Endpoint cannot be empty for the batch.
critical_no_path_log: ❌ Critical Error: File {{name}} has no server path or content
file_duplicate: File '{{name}}' is already in the list.
file_uploaded_lang_not_in_list: File '{{name}}' ({{type}}) uploaded. Language detected but not in list: {{lang}}
no_file_uploaded_yet: No file uploaded yet. Upload a file to auto-detect its language.
file_no_path: File path not available for language detection.
lang_detected_not_in_list: Language detected but not in list: {{lang}}
lang_low_confidence: Low confidence detection: {{lang}} ({{confidence}}% confidence). Please select the source language manually.
lang_detection_no_result: Could not detect language from file content.
cannot_edit_file_processing: Cannot edit file '{{name}}' - it's already being processed.
translation_rate_limited_msg: ⏸️ {{name}}: Rate limited, translation auto-paused. Use the Resume button below when ready.
translation_partial_msg: ⚠️ {{name}}: translation finished, but some parts could not be translated.
srt_completion_warning_heading: Some subtitles could not be translated and remain in the source language
srt_completion_warning_blocks: {{count}} subtitle block(s) still incomplete after retries
srt_completion_warning_intro: The LLM kept dropping [N] index markers in these blocks despite the reinforced retries. The affected subtitles kept their original text and the job remains resumable to retry the failed blocks. To improve reliability:
srt_completion_tip_block_size: Reduce the number of subtitles per request (SRT_LINES_PER_BLOCK in your .env file, e.g. 5 instead of 10) — shorter blocks are easier to reproduce marker for marker.
completion_warning_heading: Translations are correct — only the formatting may need attention
completion_warning_heading_untranslated: Some chunks could not be translated and remain in the source language
completion_warning_intro: The LLM had trouble keeping the original formatting (inline tags, styles, line breaks) perfectly in place. Across {{processed}} chunks: {{retryPct}}% needed retries and {{fallbackPct}}% used approximate tag positioning (avg {{avgErrors}} formatting issues per chunk). For cleaner formatting next time, consider:
session_corrupted_log: Previous session state was corrupted, starting fresh
session_could_not_restore: Could not restore previous session, starting fresh
session_init_failed: Could not fully restore previous session state
session_job_missing_log: Translation job no longer exists, resetting
session_state_save_quota: Browser storage full, could not save translation state
cannot_resume_in_progress_title: ⚠️ Cannot resume: a translation is already in progress
cannot_resume_active: ⚠️ Cannot resume: a translation is already in progress ({{names}}). Please wait for it to finish or interrupt it.
confirm_resume: Do you want to resume this translation?
resume_success: ✅ Translation resumed successfully! Resuming from chunk {{chunk}}
resume_change_model_title: Resume with a different model or provider
resume_style_warning: Switching model mid-book may cause a style break between the already-translated and remaining chunks.
confirm_delete_checkpoint:
Are you sure you want to delete this checkpoint?

This action is irreversible and you will lose all progress.
job_card_completed_resume_title: This translation is complete. Use Add New Content with an updated source file instead.
add_new_content_title: Select an updated source file and translate only the changed or newly added content
confirm_add_new_content: Use "{{name}}" as the updated source file and translate only new or changed content?
job_card_partial_title: Translation finished but {{count}} chunk(s) failed. Resume to retry them.
job_card_failed_title: {{count}} chunk(s) failed and will be retried on resume.
stat_fallbacks_tooltip: Phase 2 (token alignment) + Phase 3 (untranslated) chunks. Indicates the LLM struggled with placeholders.
fallback_panel_intro_critical: The LLM is struggling to preserve structural tags. After {{processed}} chunks: {{retryPct}}% needed retries, {{fallbackPct}}% fell back to alignment/untranslated mode (avg {{avgErrors}} placeholder errors per chunk). Consider stopping and adjusting one of:
fallback_panel_tip_plain_text_mode: Enable {{link}} — feeds the LLM near-plain text instead of marked-up content, for cleaner near error-free translations (trade-off: very limited formatting).
delete_uploaded_error_log: ⚠️ Error occurred while deleting uploaded files.
preferences_save_quota: Browser storage full, could not save preferences
quicktest_button_title: Quick test: translate 5 excerpts with the selected LLM
quicktest_intro: A quick taste of how the selected LLM translates 5 excerpts from this file, using your current options. No commitment — just a preview before the full run.
quicktest_error_no_file: This file isn't ready yet — try again once it has finished uploading.
quicktest_error_no_model: No model selected. Pick a provider and model first.
quicktest_error_no_target: Set a target language for this file before testing.
quicktest_error_empty: This file is too small to sample.
profile_save_title: Save current settings as a profile
context_edit_resync_title: Edit this snapshot and re-sync all subsequent chunks
context_pause_resync_title: Pause context re-sync after the current chunk finishes
context_resume_resync_title: Resume context re-sync with the current model settings
context_edit_global_title: Edit book-wide characters, genders, glossary, and terminology
context_global_anchor_missing: The first historical context snapshot is unavailable.
context_resync_unavailable: No editable context snapshot is selected.
context_global_resync_started_log: [System] Global context saved. The context timeline will be re-synchronized from its first available snapshot.
profile_enter_name: Enter a name for this Translation Profile (e.g. 'Project Alpha'):
context_recovery_confirm: A backup will be created first. Completed chunks kept: {{completed}}. Failed chunks reset: {{failed}}. Relationship edges quarantined: {{edges}}. Continue?
pair_refinement_source_missing: Add a translated file to the refinement queue first.
pair_refinement_source_failed: Could not pair the original source: {{error}}
context_no_job_body: No active or recent translation job found to load context from.
context_no_context_body: No snapshot found for this chunk.
context_resync_started_log: [System] Context re-sync started from chunk {{chunk}}. This will process in the background.
context_resync_pause_requested_log: [System] Context re-sync will pause after the current chunk is saved.
context_resync_resumed_log: [System] Context re-sync resumed with the current model settings.
context_open_folder_failed: Failed to open novel contexts folder
editor_diagnostics_legacy: This job has no classified Senior Editor diagnostics.
editor_diagnostics_summary: Runs: {{total}} · successful: {{successful}} · review: {{review}} · hard failures: {{failed}} · recovered: {{recovered}}
editor_retry_queued: Senior Editor retry queued. Resume the job to run it.
